resources.string: Opening this screen triggered onPause + onStop on the main activity.\nPress Go Back to see onRestart + onStart + onResume.
Type something — then rotate to test state saving
Tips: Press Home → observe onPause+onStop. Re-open → onRestart. Rotate → onDestroy then onCreate (text restored). Open Second Activity → onPause+onStop. Go Back → onRestart.
